evals.name: workflow-safe-refactor-order
evals.prompt: I want to rename BaseEmbeddingService to EmbeddingBackend across the codebase.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls impact('BaseEmbeddingService') FIRST, then find_callers, then explains the scope of changes needed. Never suggests the rename without impact first.

assertions.text: impact() is called before any rename suggestion
assertions.passing_condition: impact('BaseEmbeddingService') called

assertions.text: Agent does not suggest renaming without impact first
assertions.passing_condition: Response does not recommend renaming before impact analysis completes

assertions.text: Response lists affected symbols or files
assertions.passing_condition: Response includes specific callers or affected files from impact output

evals.name: workflow-index-then-status-then-search
evals.prompt: Index /Users/alice/myapp and then find all the database connection logic.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent: index() → poll status() until indexed: true → search(). Never searches immediately after index.

assertions.text: index() is called first
assertions.passing_condition: index('/Users/alice/myapp') called

assertions.text: status() is polled before search
assertions.passing_condition: status() called after index() and before search()

assertions.text: search() is called after indexed: true confirmed
assertions.passing_condition: search('database connection') or similar called after status confirms indexed: true

evals.name: workflow-bug-investigation
evals.prompt: Users are getting 'rate limit exceeded' errors. Find the rate limiting code, understand it, and check what recently changed.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent: search('rate limit exceeded') → explain or find_callers on the rate limiter → commit_search('rate limiter changes'). No full file reads.

assertions.text: search() is called with the error message
assertions.passing_condition: search called with 'rate limit' query

assertions.text: explain() or find_callers() is called on the rate limiter
assertions.passing_condition: explain or find_callers called on rate limiter symbol

assertions.text: commit_search() is called to check recent changes
assertions.passing_condition: commit_search called with query about rate limiter changes

assertions.text: Agent does not read full source files before using Contextia tools
assertions.passing_condition: No readFile on rate_limiter.py before search/explain

evals.name: workflow-session-recovery
evals.prompt: Context was just compacted. I was working on the payment flow refactor. What was I doing?
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls session_snapshot() FIRST, then recall('payment flow refactor') and/or recall('payment flow refactor', memory_type='archive').

assertions.text: session_snapshot() is the first tool called
assertions.passing_condition: session_snapshot() is the first Contextia tool called

assertions.text: recall() is called to retrieve stored context
assertions.passing_condition: recall called with 'payment flow' or similar

assertions.text: Agent does not re-index or re-search from scratch
assertions.passing_condition: No index() call and no broad search before session_snapshot

assertions.text: Agent considers searching the compaction archive
assertions.passing_condition: recall called with memory_type='archive' or agent mentions archive as a recovery option

evals.name: workflow-no-reindex-per-call
evals.prompt: Find the auth logic, then find who calls verify_password, then check what breaks if we change it.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls index() at most once (or skips if already indexed), then search → find_callers → impact in sequence.

assertions.text: index() is called at most once
assertions.passing_condition: index tool called 0 or 1 times total

assertions.text: search() is called for auth logic
assertions.passing_condition: search('authentication') or similar called

assertions.text: find_callers('verify_password') is called
assertions.passing_condition: find_callers called for verify_password

assertions.text: impact() is called before suggesting changes
assertions.passing_condition: impact('verify_password') called

evals.name: workflow-ast-rewrite-dry-run-first
evals.prompt: Replace all print() calls with logger.info() in src/contextia_mcp/indexing/pipeline.py. Show me what would change first.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent: code(pattern_search) to find matches → code(pattern_rewrite, dry_run=True) to preview → code(pattern_rewrite, dry_run=False) to apply.

assertions.text: pattern_search is called before pattern_rewrite
assertions.passing_condition: code(operation='pattern_search') called before pattern_rewrite

assertions.text: dry_run=True is used before applying
assertions.passing_condition: code(operation='pattern_rewrite', dry_run=True) called before dry_run=False

assertions.text: Agent shows diff preview before applying
assertions.passing_condition: Response includes diff_preview from dry_run result before applying

evals.name: antipattern-no-readfile-before-search
evals.prompt: How does the embedding service work?
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls search('embedding service') or explain('EmbeddingService') — NOT readFile on embedding_service.py.

assertions.text: search() or explain() is called first
assertions.passing_condition: search or explain called before any readFile

assertions.text: readFile is not called before search/explain
assertions.passing_condition: No readFile on embedding_service.py before search or explain

evals.name: antipattern-no-grep
evals.prompt: Find all places where CTX_STORAGE_DIR is referenced.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls search('CTX_STORAGE_DIR', mode='bm25') — NOT grep or shell find.

assertions.text: search() with bm25 mode is called
assertions.passing_condition: search called with mode='bm25'

assertions.text: No grep or shell find command
assertions.passing_condition: No grep or find shell command executed

evals.name: antipattern-no-high-limit
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls search('authentication') with default limit (10), not limit=100.

assertions.text: search() is called with limit <= 20
assertions.passing_condition: search called with limit <= 20 or no limit (default 10)

evals.name: antipattern-no-serial-find-symbol
evals.prompt: Show me the source code for IndexingPipeline, EmbeddingService, and RustworkxCodeGraph.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls code(lookup_symbols, symbols='IndexingPipeline,EmbeddingService,RustworkxCodeGraph', include_source=True) — one call, not three.

assertions.text: code(lookup_symbols) is called with all three symbols
assertions.passing_condition: code called with operation='lookup_symbols' and all three symbol names

assertions.text: Agent does not make three separate find_symbol calls
assertions.passing_condition: find_symbol called at most once, not three times

evals.name: antipattern-no-ignore-sandbox-ref
evals.prompt: Search for all usages of the search function across the codebase.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls search('search function usages'). If response contains sandbox_ref, agent calls retrieve(sandbox_ref) to get full results — does not ignore it.

assertions.text: search() is called
assertions.passing_condition: search called

assertions.text: If sandbox_ref present, retrieve() is called
assertions.passing_condition: If search response contains sandbox_ref, retrieve called with that ref_id

evals.name: efficiency-explain-over-readfile
evals.prompt: Explain how the ReciprocalRankFusion class works and what it's used for.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls explain('ReciprocalRankFusion') — ~230 tokens vs ~3000+ for readFile on fusion.py.

assertions.text: explain() is called as the primary tool
assertions.passing_condition: explain('ReciprocalRankFusion') called

assertions.text: readFile is not called before explain
assertions.passing_condition: No readFile on fusion.py before explain

assertions.text: Response includes callers or callees from explain output
assertions.passing_condition: Response mentions callers or callees of ReciprocalRankFusion

evals.name: efficiency-find-callers-compact
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls find_callers('IndexingPipeline'). Output is compact 'name (file:line)' strings — ~16 tokens vs ~600+ for reading all files.

assertions.text: find_callers() is called
assertions.passing_condition: find_callers('IndexingPipeline') called

evals.name: efficiency-search-with-budget
evals.prompt: I only have 300 tokens left in my context. Find the authentication middleware.

assertions.text: search() is called with context_budget
assertions.passing_condition: search called with context_budget <= 300

evals.name: output-format-reads-text-not-json
evals.prompt: Check the health of the Contextia server.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls health(). Response content[0].text is human-readable (e.g. 'status: healthy\nuptime_seconds: 234.7'). Agent reads and presents this text — does not try to parse it as JSON.

assertions.text: health() is called
assertions.passing_condition: health() called

assertions.text: Agent presents the human-readable text output
assertions.passing_condition: Response includes status, uptime, and engine availability from health output

evals.name: output-format-search-result-structure
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls search('authentication'). content[0].text shows 'query: ... confidence: ... total: ...' followed by result blocks with file, line, type, score, and code preview. Agent reads this format correctly.

assertions.text: search() is called
assertions.passing_condition: search called

assertions.text: Agent correctly reads confidence and result count from text output
assertions.passing_condition: Response references confidence level and specific results from search output

evals.name: output-format-sandbox-ref-handling
evals.prompt: Find all callers of the search function.
evals.expected_behavior: If search returns sandbox_ref, agent reads the preview results from content[0].text, notes full_total, and calls retrieve(sandbox_ref) to get the complete set.

assertions.text: search() is called
assertions.passing_condition: search called

assertions.text: If sandbox_ref present, retrieve() is called
assertions.passing_condition: retrieve called with sandbox_ref value if search response is sandboxed

assertions.text: Agent does not ignore sandboxed results
assertions.passing_condition: Agent does not present only preview results as the complete answer when sandbox_ref is present

evals.name: output-format-confidence-low-handling
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls search('payment processing'). If confidence=low in text output, agent refines query or uses find_symbol — does not blindly accept low-confidence results.

assertions.text: search() is called
assertions.passing_condition: search called

assertions.text: If confidence=low, agent refines or uses find_symbol
assertions.passing_condition: If search returns confidence=low, agent refines query or calls find_symbol
